description: The LegacySessionOrbsController component displays session orbs of current sessions into a slot. This component was used in what some players called the "Session plate" which would have many world orbs of active sessions.

fields.SpawnRadius: The radius of spawning orbs in a cylinder shape.
fields.SpawnHeight: The height of spawning orbs in a cylinder shape.
fields.SpawnOffset: The offset of the spawn cylinder shape in local space vs the center on ``_root``
fields._root: Where to place and spawn session orbs.
fields.MaxOrbs: How many orbs can be under ``_root`` at any one time.

usage: Used in items that display current sessions in Resonite.
